Predicts network interference (R² = 0.6534), detects anomalies in real time, explains predictions with SHAP, and visualizes 5G network performance through an interactive dashboard.

items.name: supply-chain-late-delivery-prediction
items.description: An end-to-end industrial machine learning framework that predicts shipment delays using the DataCo Smart Supply Chain Dataset. It processes 180k records, implements rigorous leakage auditing, and features a nine-model tournament where a baseline Decision Tree achieved a 91.5% F1-score. Includes a Streamlit batch prediction app.

items.name: multiagent-rl-rm
items.description: The Multi-Agent RLRM (Reinforcement Learning with Reward Machines) Framework is a library designed to facilitate the formulation of multi-agent problems and solve them through reinforcement learning. The framework supports the integration of Reward Machines (RMs), providing a modular and flexible structure for defining complex tasks.
